subcodes.first_line: In this manifest hour, the Tongue of favor of the Lord of all worlds addresseth the children of Khalíl and his heirs [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در این حین مبین لسان عنایت رب العالمین ابناء خلیل و وراث
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @praise and encouragement, @personal instructions, @spiritual transformation
